data.title: CLASSIC CHEVROLET GRAPEVINE EARNS WORLD'S #1 CHEVROLET DEALERSHIP TITLE FOR THIRD STRAIGHT YEAR, HOSTS CHAMPIONSHIP PARADE AND TROPHY PRESENTATION
data.description: A Chevrolet dealership based in Grapevine, Texas, was recently honored as the number one Chevrolet dealership globally for the third consecutive year and twelfth time overall. To celebrate this remarkable feat, the dealership located in Grapevine, Texas will...

data.title: Jacksonville Dental Practice Now Offers Same-Day Crowns, Eliminating the Wait for Permanent Restorations
data.description: Patients at the Dental Center of Jacksonville in Florida can now benefit from Aman Girrbach same-day crowns, a new service that allows for the creation of permanent and custom-milled ceramic restorations in just one visit. This cutting-edge technology is part of the practice's commitment to expanding its advanced dental services, offering patients quicker and more convenient solutions for their oral health needs.

data.title: Rezolve AI Gears Up For FY Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Rezolve AI PLC (NASDAQ: RZLV) is scheduled to report its earnings for the second half and full year ended December 31, 2025, before the market opens on Monday, March 30. The company recently acquired Reward for $230 million on February 11. Following this news, Rezolve AI's shares rose by 0.6% to reach $2.3650 on Friday. For the latest analyst ratings on Rezolve AI, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website. The page allows users to sort ratings by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria. HC Wainwright is among the analysts who have recently rated the company. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Preferred Employers Insurance, a Berkley company, Announces the Promotion of Lorena Hawkins to AVP Underwriting
data.description: In San Diego on March 27, 2026, Preferred Employers Insurance, a subsidiary of Berkley, has promoted Lorena Hawkins to Assistant Vice President of Underwriting. Lorena, with more than 12 years of expertise in underwriting, operations, and team management, has been recognized for her contributions and dedication.

data.title: $4.2B frozen by Tether for illicit funds, recognized by OSCE for fighting human trafficking through blockchain tracking.
data.description: A recent report by the OSCE has emphasized Tether's significant role in fighting human trafficking by utilizing blockchain technology for tracing. The report revealed that a substantial amount of $4.2 billion has been frozen as a result of collaboration with 340 law enforcement partnerships. This initiative has proven to be effective in curbing illegal activities and aiding in the fight against human trafficking.

data.title: Top Endpoint Protection Solutions Recognized in Info-Tech Research Group's 2026 Emotional Footprint Report
data.description: The 2026 Endpoint Protection Emotional Footprint Report assesses top endpoint protection solutions for enterprise and midmarket segments based on confirmed end-user reviews from SoftwareReviews, Info-Tech Research Group's peer-review platform. data.title: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, sells significant stakes in Meta, Nvidia, and Bitcoin ETF during tech sell-off. Stocks and crypto plummet.
data.description: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, made notable transactions by selling significant portions of its holdings in U.S. tech stocks while also divesting from its Bitcoin ETF amidst market declines. Wood's company took action by offloading substantial amounts of assets, reflecting the shifting landscape within the technology and cryptocurrency sectors. This decision to sell off portions of American tech stocks and the firm's Bitcoin ETF came amid a broader trend of decreasing valuations across these markets.

data.title: USDC & CCTP integrated into Pharos L1 before mainnet launch, with $10M incubator program for RWA-focused blockchain.
data.description: Circle has revealed the integration of USDC and cross-chain transfer protocol with Pharos, an RWA-focused L1 blockchain gearing up for mainnet launch with a $10M incubator program. This move signifies a significant step towards enhancing interoperability and accessibility within the blockchain space.

data.title: VIVAZEN® Urges Immediate Action on 7-OH as U.S. House of Representatives Examines End Needless Distribution of 7-OH Act
data.description: In Phoenix, VIVAZEN®, the top botanical wellness company in the country, supports the congressional examination of 7-hydroxymitragynine (7-OH). The House Energy and Commerce Subcommittee on Health is conducting a legislative hearing on H.R. 8000, the End Needless Distribution of 7-OH Act, proposed by Representative Gus Bilirakis (R-FL), along with other illicit-drug bills. This hearing highlights increasing worries in Washington regarding 7-OH. Members of the subcommittee have urged the Drug Enforcement Administration to take action.
